ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location (county) where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "covid_count" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed COVID-19 cases */,
  "covid_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "covid_test" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 tests conducted */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "vaccination_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "hospital_capacity" INTEGER /* Available hospital capacity */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Available ICU capacity */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "test_positivity_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., state health department, hospital reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location (county) */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* State code where the county is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "land_area" INTEGER /* Land area of the county */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the county */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the location data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
Reference to the location (county) where the data was collected
Percentage of the population that is vaccinated
Number of new cases reported on the given date
Source of the data (e.g., state health department, hospital reports)
